DeepSeek-V3.1: <｜tool▁calls▁begin｜><｜tool▁call▁begin｜>tool_call_name<｜tool▁sep｜>tool_call_arguments<｜tool▁call▁end｜><｜tool▁calls▁end｜>
DeepSeek-R1/V3: <｜tool▁calls▁begin｜><｜tool▁cal

For gemm sizes with large M, the added gemms are much faster.

vllm.title: [V1][P/D]P2pNcclConnector supports flashinfer
vllm.author: Abatom
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, the P2pNcclConnector only supports KV-cache layouts similar to those used in Flash-Attention, e.g., [2, num_pages, page_size, xxx], and those used in MLA, e.g., [num_pages, page_size, xxx].


In contrast, FlashInfer’s KV-cache layout is [num_pages, 2, page_size, xxx].

vllm.title: [Frontend] Optimize beam search performance by limiting concurrency
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Current beam search will redo the prefill of all tokens for the generation of each token if the prefix cache cannot hold all tokens. This PR introduces a concurency_limit so that people can set it to a small enough value to achieve prefix cache hit
This PR also fixes a small bug in benchmark

vllm.title: [Quantization] Expand compressed-tensors MoE matching logic to support NFP4 + FP8 MoEs
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Small fix / update when using per-layer format to fetch correct scheme instead of using the global format
Updates the get_moe_method to handle cases where configs use linear layer names, not just the layer type Linear
This will allow support for more configs, including non-uniform quantizat

vllm.title: [Core] Use key-only cache for `BaseMultiModalProcessor`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Currently both P0 and P1 store multi-modal processor outputs. This PR makes it so that only one process needs to store the processor outputs, halving the memory usage overall.

If IPC is enabled, P0 uses MultiModalProcessorSenderCache (only stores hashes and metadata of processor outputs) wh
